queries.question: Please provide categories that are shared across all film festivals
queries.sql: SELECT Categories.category_name  from Film_Festivals_Categories join Categories on Film_Festivals_Categories.category_id = Categories.id join Film_Festivals on Film_Festivals_Categories.film_festival_id = Film_Festivals.id   GROUP BY Film_Festivals_Categories.category_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Film_Festivals_Categories.film_festival_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Film_Festivals)

queries.question: Could you provide the categories for all film festivals?
queries.sql: select film_festivals.name , categories.category_name from Film_Festivals_Categories join Categories on Film_Festivals_Categories.category_id = Categories.id join Film_Festivals on Film_Festivals_Categories.film_festival_id = Film_Festivals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?category_name WHERE {
  ?film_festivals_categories a :Film_Festivals_Categories .
  ?categories a :Categories .
  ?film_festivals_categories p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?film_festivals a :Film_Festivals .
  ?film_festivals_categories p:hasFilm_Festivals ?film_festivals .
  ?film_festivals p:name ?name .
  ?categories p:category_name ?category_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What categories are associated with each film festival?
